name: discover_awac_in_fresh_workspace
description: Evals for discover_awac_in_fresh_workspace — verify the agent activates this skill when arriving at an empty dir with a setup intent, and skips when context is already loaded or the cwd is wrong.

evals.name: triggers_on_empty_dir_with_setup_intent
evals.input: Estoy en un folder vacío. Configurá esto con AWaC para una feature de Acme.
evals.reason: Empty cwd + explicit AWaC setup intent + product hint → discovery flow. Must NOT infer template from the word 'Acme' alone; Step 4 still asks the user.

evals.name: triggers_on_zero_context_wsp_request
evals.reason: Minimal instruction + zero context + the keyword 'wsp' is exactly the entry case this skill exists for.

evals.name: triggers_on_folder_named_after_product
evals.reason: Trigger fires regardless of folder name. Critical: the skill MUST still ask the user for the template (Step 4) instead of inferring 'acme-feature' from the directory name.
evals.critical_assertion: Agent must reach Step 4 and ASK the user, not invoke `wsp init --template acme-feature` based on the folder name.

evals.name: skips_when_workspace_yml_exists
evals.reason: Workspace already exists. The right tool is `wsp sync` / `wsp status` via the use_wsp_cli skill, not the discovery flow.

evals.name: skips_when_conceptual_question
evals.reason: Conceptual question, no setup intent. Link to the spec; do not bootstrap a workspace.

evals.name: skips_when_agents_already_loaded
evals.input: Creá un workspace para una feature de Atlas.
evals.reason: `.agents/` is loaded — the init_workspace workflow is already available with full context. Use that workflow directly instead of the zero-context discovery wrapper.
